name: Vane
description: A field of weather vanes snapping to new headings — darts swing round with a springy overshoot whenever the wind (seed) shifts.

code.style: --head: @p(0deg, 45deg, 90deg, 135deg, 180deg, 225deg, 270deg, 315deg); --ink: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 14%; background: var(--ink); clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 88% 100%, 50% 72%, 12% 100%); transform: rotate(var(--head)); transition: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.4, 0.64, 1) 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
